title: Introducing WiamLabs
excerpt: The company behind WiamApp and WiamTrade — based in Ghana.
author: WiamLabs
body: WiamLabs is a technology company in Ghana. We ship WiamApp, a marketplace for booking verified workers, and WiamTrade, a Telegram mini app for practice and live trading.
This website is where we publish company news, product updates, and press information. The apps themselves live at wiamapp.com and on Telegram.
We will post here when there is something concrete to share.

title: WiamApp: book workers in your city
excerpt: Customers book electricians, plumbers, cleaners, and other verified professionals.
author: WiamLabs
body: WiamApp lists verified workers by category and city. Customers book in the app; workers manage jobs and build a track record on the platform.
The product is live at wiamapp.com. Support questions go to support@wiamapp.com.
WiamApp is a WiamLabs product. © 2026 WiamApp. Powered by WiamLabs.

title: WiamTrade: practice, then go live
excerpt: Practice on live charts with virtual capital. Connect your exchange when you choose.
author: WiamLabs
body: WiamTrade runs inside Telegram. Practice mode uses live market data with virtual capital — no broker keys required.
Live mode connects to your exchange. WiamLabs does not hold your funds.
